summary: No substantive information on recording or performance; reviewers only note a naming correction.
review: The single review for this entry does not discuss the music, setlist, or audio fidelity. It merely points out an error in the archivist's name (Haugh vs. Houck) and offers no insight into the show's quality or the recording's technical characteristics.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review, which focuses on a metadata typo and gives a zero‑star rating; no data to assess musical or recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer mentions only a naming mistake; no comments on sound clarity, mix, or source.
